# AAG Digital Marketing

> AAG Digital Marketing is a social media, content production, and paid advertising agency based in Mahwah, New Jersey, serving Bergen County and the New York metro area. Founded in 2021.

## What we do

- Content creation and video production: short-form video (Reels, TikTok, Shorts), drone cinematography, brand photography, on-location filming with professional equipment
- Social media management: platform strategy, content calendars, publishing, community management, monthly growth reporting
- Paid advertising and lead generation: Google Ads and Meta Ads management, retargeting, landing pages, lead tracking

## Results

- Generated over 100 million content views for clients
- Grew a consumer brand from 16,000 to 150,000 Instagram followers in six months
- Helped a lending client more than double annual leads (688 to 1,500) while revenue doubled year over year

## Who we serve

Medical practices, real estate teams, law firms, home service companies, and local brands.

## How we work

Clients work directly with the owner on every project. Month-to-month terms, no long-term contracts. Engagements begin with a free audit of the client's social media, content, and advertising.

## Contact

- Website: https://www.aagdm.com
- Phone: (201) 503-4737
- Email: theaagdm@gmail.com
